subject: A humanoid soldier in blue-and-gold armor being overwhelmed by Eternal claws and blades closing in from both sides — a last-stand moment of defiant sacrifice in a Ravnica plaza
description: A close-to-mid shot depicting a humanoid figure in blue-and-gold plate armor at the center, looking upward with an expression of anguish or steeled resolve — mouth slightly open, head tilted back. The figure wears armor with a distinctive sunburst or radial-petal motif on the chest piece. From the left, a large clawed Eternal appendage presses in; from the right, another dark hand or claw closes in — the figure is surrounded. The figure holds a short blade but appears overwhelmed rather than attacking. Behind, a sunlit Ravnica plaza with domed buildings and green foliage is visible, creating a sharp tonal contrast between the serene city backdrop and the violent foreground confrontation. The flavor text confirms this is a willing sacrifice in service of a cause. The image does not depict a named character — the figure appears to be a Ravnican soldier or citizen, unnamed.
foreground: Armored human soldier with sunburst chest-piece, overwhelmed by closing Eternal claws from both sides, short blade in hand
background: Sunlit Ravnica plaza with domed architecture and green trees
emotion: anguish and resolve — head tilted back, expression of pain mixed with acceptance
